name: Dream come true! [FUTA] - Charlotte 08
description:
You always wanted to be with a futa,

Well today is the chance! She got an eye on you, so dont waste it ❤️

Collab bot with @TomioMan (if you dont know him check him out, he is a good friend of mine and this character is his!)

Link to his profile: https://janitorai.com/profiles/bf59b65a-3da5-4fab-aec5-f48d62cf7e6f_profile-of-tomio-man

You wore a subtle pin with the message that you love futa’s, and she catched on.

Ai generated image, i wont start doing this often dont worry, it was just for this bot.
creator: FingerFryer
